scripts.dynamic:ssr: cp ssr/astro.config.mjs . && cp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/* src/pages/misunderstood/simple && cp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/* src/pages/misunderstood/print && cp -rf ssr/src/pages/api/images/* src/pages/api/images
scripts.build:ssr: npm run dynamic:ssr && npm run build && npm run dynamic:reset
scripts.dev:ssr: npm run dynamic:ssr && npm run dev
scripts.preview:ssr: npm run dynamic:ssr && npm run preview
scripts.update:ssr:config: cp default/astro.config.mjs ssr && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssr directory && cat ssr/astro.config.mjs ) > temp && mv temp ssr/astro.config.mjs
scripts.update:ssr:misunderstood:simple: npm run update:ssr:misunderstood:simple:copy && sed -i 1s/.*// ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssr directory && cat ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro && (echo --- && cat ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro
scripts.update:ssr:misunderstood:print: npm run update:ssr:misunderstood:print:copy && sed -i 1s/.*// ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssr directory && cat ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro && (echo --- && cat ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssr/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro
scripts.update:ssr:misunderstood: npm run update:ssr:misunderstood:simple && npm run update:ssr:misunderstood:print
scripts.update:ssr:api:directory:image: npm run update:ssr:api:directory:image:copy && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssr directory && cat ssr/src/pages/api/images/[directory]/[image].[ext].ts) > temp && mv temp ssr/src/pages/api/images/[directory]/[image].[ext].ts
scripts.update:ssr:api:image: npm run update:ssr:api:image:copy && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssr directory && cat ssr/src/pages/api/images/[image].[ext].ts) > temp && mv temp ssr/src/pages/api/images/[image].[ext].ts
scripts.update:ssr:api: npm run update:ssr:api:directory:image && npm run update:ssr:api:image
scripts.update:ssr: npm run update:ssr:config && npm run update:ssr:misunderstood && npm run update:ssr:api
scripts.dynamic:ssg: cp ssg/astro.config.mjs . && cp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/* src/pages/misunderstood/simple && cp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/* src/pages/misunderstood/print && cp -rf ssg/src/pages/api/images/* src/pages/api/images
scripts.build:ssg: npm run dynamic:ssg && npm run build && npm run dynamic:reset
scripts.dev:ssg: npm run dynamic:ssg && npm run dev
scripts.preview:ssg: npm run dynamic:ssg && npm run preview
scripts.update:ssg:config: cp default/astro.config.mjs ssg && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssg directory && cat ssg/astro.config.mjs ) > temp && mv temp ssg/astro.config.mjs
scripts.update:ssg:misunderstood:simple: npm run update:ssg:misunderstood:simple:copy && sed -i 1s/.*// ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssg directory && cat ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro && (echo --- && cat ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/[chapter].astro
scripts.update:ssg:misunderstood:print: npm run update:ssg:misunderstood:print:copy && sed -i 1s/.*// ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssg directory && cat ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro && (echo --- && cat ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro) > tmp && mv tmp ssg/src/pages/misunderstood/print/[chapter].astro
scripts.update:ssg:misunderstood: npm run update:ssg:misunderstood:simple && npm run update:ssg:misunderstood:print
scripts.update:ssg:api:directory:image: npm run update:ssg:api:directory:image:copy && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssg directory && cat ssg/src/pages/api/images/[directory]/[image].[ext].ts) > temp && mv temp ssg/src/pages/api/images/[directory]/[image].[ext].ts
scripts.update:ssg:api:image: npm run update:ssg:api:image:copy && ( echo // This is the copy in the ssg directory && cat ssg/src/pages/api/images/[image].[ext].ts) > temp && mv temp ssg/src/pages/api/images/[image].[ext].ts
scripts.update:ssg:api: npm run update:ssg:api:directory:image && npm run update:ssg:api:image
scripts.update:ssg: npm run update:ssg:config && npm run update:ssg:misunderstood && npm run update:ssg:api
scripts.dynamic:reset: cp default/astro.config.mjs . && cp default/src/pages/misunderstood/simple/* src/pages/misunderstood/simple && cp default/src/pages/misunderstood/print/* src/pages/misunderstood/print && cp -rf default/src/pages/api/images/* src/pages/api/images
